scripts.build:src: yarn prepare && vite build && yarn cap sync
scripts.build:tests: cd ../client/test && rm -rf dist && yarn tsc && cd ..
scripts.test: PUBLIC_TEST_ENVIRONMENT=1 yarn build && concurrently --success 'command-3' --kill-others 'mailpit' 'yarn preview' 'cd ../server && ACCESS_TOKEN_DURATION=4 REFRESH_TOKEN_SHORT_DURATION=10 INSECURE_EASY_CAPTCHA_FOR_TESTS=true CLIENT_PUBLIC_URL=https://localhost:4173 yarn start:prod' 'node --enable-source-maps --experimental-test-module-mocks --test test/dist/**/*.test.js'
scripts.test:only: PUBLIC_TEST_ENVIRONMENT=1 yarn build && concurrently --success 'command-3' --kill-others 'mailpit' 'yarn preview' 'cd ../server && ACCESS_TOKEN_DURATION=4 REFRESH_TOKEN_SHORT_DURATION=10 INSECURE_EASY_CAPTCHA_FOR_TESTS=true CLIENT_PUBLIC_URL=https://localhost:4173 yarn start:prod' 'node --enable-source-maps --experimental-test-module-mocks --test-only --test test/dist/**/*.test.js'
